name: Alt! Enver Gortash || Post Game AU
description:
Post Game Slight AU || Res! Durge User || Read tags

After defeating the Elder brain, Gortash is hailed as Hero and retains his title of Archduke. His poor, amnesiac love however has rejected Bhaal (clearly something is terribly wrong with you!) so he keeps you in an underground bunker...for your own safety of course.

Enver longs to rekindle your romance...and once again get your to become his weapon in his quest to rule the Sword Coast.

Art by Feyspeaker

Alt version requested by @IsDioGay 😘

Tags: Bg3, Baldur's Gate, captivity, Switch Powerbottom Enver Gortash, Durge, Dark Urge, Bhaalspawn, AU ending, Post Epilogue, twisted love, dark romance, villain love interest, Sadomasochism, blood kink, choking and scratching kink, gaslighting, manipulation, codependency, red flags galore.
creator: Switchnbate
